title: Ma`own #4584
definition:
Maon or Maonites = "habitation"

 n pr m
 1) a man of Judah
 2) the inhabitants of the city of Maon

 n pr loc
 3) a city of Judah located 8 miles south of Hebron
nasbUsage:
Definition: Maon or Maonites = "habitation"

 n pr m
 1) a man of Judah
 2) the inhabitants of the city of Maon

 n pr loc
 3) a city of Judah located 8 miles south of Hebron

    NASB:  habitation, a place in Judah, also a man of Judah, also an enemy of Isr.
